title: Naach Lucky Naach
desc: Ten-year-old Lakshmi dreams of winning a national-level dance competition, but she hesitates to participate when her single mother, Nandini, detests music and dance.

title: Surya The Soldier
desc: When a soldier lands in trouble due to his anger issues, he begins seeing a psychologist in hopes of one day returning to duty.

title: Chori Chori Chupke Chupke
desc: Raj and Priya, a married couple, hire Madhubala, a prostitute, as the surrogate mother of their child. Trouble brews when Madhubala falls in love with Raj and insists on keeping the child.

title: Insaaf Kaun Karega
desc: Jageera abandons his wife and son Vikram to join a life of crime. Years later, when Vikram, now a police officer, sets out to put an end to Jageera's activities, he swears to kill him.

title: The Hero: Love Story of a Spy
desc: Arun Khanna, an Indian spy, collaborates with Reshma to stop a nuclear attack. However, Reshma's identity is compromised during her undercover mission in Pakistan.
